changelog: v1.5.21: Installer now installs to %LOCALAPPDATA% - no admin rights or UAC prompt required.
changes: FIX: Installer now targets %LOCALAPPDATA% (not Program Files) - no admin rights needed
FIX: No UAC prompt - fresh install works for all users including standard accounts
FIX: All registry writes moved to HKCU - Add/Remove Programs entry visible per-user
FIX: RequestExecutionLevel user - installer never triggers UAC
